overview: I got Claude working from my own machine in Week 1 — something I couldn't do with PyTorch in 2018. Set up Python, venv, VS Code, and the Anthropic SDK, then made my first API call in ~10 lines of code. The entry point is accessible, but setup was still the hardest part.

keyPoints.title: First working API call took only ~10 lines of code
venv activation resets each terminal session — easy gotcha
Running Claude via code exposes system prompt, temperature, history
Vibe-coding masks hard work: config, errors, debugging, evals
